projects.name: Deep Learning Research Project – Text Error Correction
projects.description: Trained and fine-tuned ViT5 and BartPho models in PyTorch, achieving strong performance in Vietnamese text correction. Improved model accuracy through iterative experiments and optimization in a 2-member team.

projects.name: Visual Question Answering Project
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end Visual Question Answering (VQA) system using generative AI for dataset creation and a custom CNN–LSTM–Attention model for training. Automated image captioning and question–answer generation using BLIP and Gemini API, and designed and evaluated the model on animal image datasets with visual feedback and loss tracking in Google Colab.

projects.name: OCR System with CNN+Transformer Decoder
projects.description: Built an OCR pipeline combining CNNs for feature extraction and Transformer Decoder for sequence modeling. Accurately extracted text from invoices, reducing manual entry errors, with limitations on blurred inputs. Applied TensorFlow and PyTorch, improving recognition performance on structured documents.
